title: CK Continuum
description: The modpack of my server, the continuum! This modpack is dedicated for me and my friends to use, makes things easier to update modpacks.
body:
The continuum is all about exploration, tech and performance! Probably one of my best packs I have made so far, the modpack is full of tech mods like Create and Spectrum, while also allowing lots of exploration with mods like Regions Unexplored, Better Nether, and more. This modpack also aims to make the game run really smooth even on higher settings, although a server is highly recommended to run it for optimal perfomance (especially with others).

Also if you somehow stumble across this modpack, and want to join my SMP/discord server, feel free to dm me @f.loading on discord, although we play a LOT of other games though, not just MC.
